About Me

Player Stats
(About Me)

⭐ Current Quest ⭐

Rehearsing for Sweeney Todd 🥧

Stats

💪 Strength

8

Can open any jar when told I can't
🤸‍♂️ Dexterity

6

There's nothing wrong with the ol' dad dancing, right?
🛡️ Constitution

12

God gave the poorliest bellies to the bravest of girls
🧠 Intelligence

14

So many strings to my bow it looks like a harp
🦉 Wisdom

12

Knows when to speak up, but not always when to stop
😎 Charisma

10

Loves public speaking. Hates the hairdressers

Stats were compiled by my resident Dungeon Master (and life partner), James ❤️

Traits

  • 👩🏻‍💻 Maths, Computer Science Coding and Data Skills
  • 🧶 Hobby hopper - catch me singing, crafting, performing and coding!
  • 🙊 Doesn't quit - I can't put a problem down once I start it.

Achievements

  • 🎭 Secretary of SOS Presents
  • 🏆 Developer of Ultimate Flaggle
  • 🍎 Performer in Local Am-Dram
  • 🎓 Masters in Computer Science

Flaws

🚫 Cares far too much about getting things right, over-commits and known to be snappy when interrupted.

Inventory

  • 💻 Laptop
  • 📖 Kindle
  • 🎧 Sony MX4s
